 Matthias Andree wrote:
 > news/tin no longer builds WITH_CANLOCK=true, since there is no canlock
 > directory any more.
 
 Oops, I missed that one. The attached patch looks good.
 
 > Also, the tin makefile invokes BSD make rather than
 > GNU make, which barfs with FORCE_MAKE_JOBS.
 
 Hmmm, that sounds like an upstream bug. Will look in to it.
 
 I'll run some extra tests and plan to commit your patch this evening.
 
 
 Thanks,
 Johan
 
 --TB36FDmn/VVEgNH/
